name: aime-desktop-task-companion
description: Mac-first desktop task companion for Aime todo monitoring.

scripts.native:build: mkdir -p .build/module-cache && CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH="$PWD/.build/module-cache" swiftc -target arm64-apple-macosx15.0 native/AimeCompanion/main.swift -framework AppKit -framework Vision -framework UserNotifications -o .build/aime-companion
scripts.native:run: npm run lark:pull -- --out tmp/aime-tasks.json || true; npm run build && ./.build/aime-companion "$PWD/tmp/aime-tasks.json"
